title_cn: 凯雷以 7 亿美元收购韩国家电租赁公司
summary: Carlyle Group Inc. agreed to acquire Chung Ho Group, a South Korean home and health-care appliance rental platform, for $700 million, as rising inheritance-tax burdens in the country push more owners to sell, people familiar with the matter said.

summary: Oil jumped after Iran and Israel traded fire, despite US President Donald Trump’s calls for both sides to quit fighting, a fresh escalation in a war that has passed the 100-day mark.

title: Korean Leveraged ETF Misfires, Jumps 50% Even as SK Hynix Slumps
title_cn: 韩国杠杆 ETF 惨遭失败，SK 海力士股价暴跌，但仍暴涨 50%
summary: A leveraged exchange-traded fund tied to SK Hynix Inc. surged 50% on Monday despite a drop of nearly 8% in the underlying stock, a dislocation the fund house later attributed to a lack of liquidity in its market-making system.

title: AI Trade Unwind Rocks Korean Traders Leveraged for One-Way Bet
title_cn: 人工智能贸易放松震撼韩国交易者进行单向投注
summary: Fear was already running high ahead of South Korea’s Monday open, but the ferocity of the selloff still caught some investors off guard.

title: Airline Bosses Gather for IATA Meeting in Rio
title_cn: 航空公司老板齐聚里约参加国际航协会议
summary: Bloomberg's Guy Johnson reports live from Rio de Janeiro on the key concerns for airline executives gathered at the International Air Transport Association's annual general meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Won Rebounds From Weakest Since 2009 on Currency Defense Plan
title_cn: 货币防御计划从 2009 年以来的最低点反弹
summary: South Korea’s won bounced back from its recent losses after the authorities said they would take tougher action against speculative trading and market activities that led to higher volatility.

title: Universal Music Sounds Out Investors for €1 Billion Bond Sale
title_cn: 环球音乐寻求投资者出售 10 亿欧元债券
summary: Universal Music Group NV is speaking to investors ahead of a possible €1 billion ($1.15 billion) two-part bond sale on Monday, after rejecting hedge fund billionaire Bill Ackman’s takeover offer.

title: Blackstone Looks to Sell $2 Billion of Fund Stakes, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称 Blackstone 计划出售 20 亿美元的基金股份
summary: Blackstone Inc. is looking to sell more than $2 billion of its stakes in private investment funds by bundling the exposure into bonds for investors, the Financial Times reported.

title: Indonesia Market Rout Deepens as Bonds, Currency, Stocks Slide
title_cn: 随着债券、货币和股票下滑，印尼市场跌势加剧
summary: Indonesia’s markets slumped on Monday, led by a sharp selloff in sovereign bonds, after the government’s latest attempt to shore up the currency failed to ease concern over its economic management.

title: Wall Street Strategists See Rally Intact After Healthy Tech Drop
title_cn: 华尔街策略师认为科技股健康下跌后反弹完好无损
summary: Strategists at some of Wall Street’s biggest banks are looking past Friday’s tech-led selloff, saying earnings growth should support stocks through the end of the year.

title: UAE Sells Bumper Gulf Oil Volumes for Loading Over Coming Months
title_cn: 阿联酋出售大量海湾石油用于未来几个月的装载
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. is selling a bumper volume of crude originating from inside the Persian Gulf to traders and refiners in Asia, in the first tenders of their kind for such grades since the Iran war began.

title: M&A Monday: Intesa's €31 Billion Bid for Paschi & Tate & Lyle Takeover | The Opening Trade 6/8/2026
title_cn: 周一并购：联合银行 (Intesa) 出价 310 亿欧元收购 Paschi & Tate & Lyle |开盘交易 6/8/2026
summary:
Intesa Sanpaolo offered to buy Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena for €30.6 billion in a move that’s set to spur a new phase of dealmaking in Italian finance. It comes a day after Banco BPM pitched a merger of equals with Monte Paschi that would result in a combined entity worth close to €50 billion.

US food company Ingredion agreed to buy Tate & Lyle for £2.7 billion, in a move that marks the end of the UK company’s near-century on the London Stock Exchange.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent Aims to Raise $3 Billion in Dollar, Yuan Bond Offering
title_cn: 腾讯拟发行 30 亿美元美元、人民币债券
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is preparing to raise around $3 billion in a dual-currency bond offering that could be priced as early as Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Stocks Halt Selloff as Rising Oil Lifts Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于油价上涨推高收益率，美国股市停止抛售：市场总结
summary: US stock futures staged a modest rebound even as flaring tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices and bond yields higher.

title: Qatar Quietly Sends LNG Tanker Through Hormuz Despite Tensions
title_cn: 尽管局势紧张，卡塔尔悄悄通过霍尔木兹运送液化天然气油轮
summary: Another liquefied natural gas shipment from Qatar transited the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, according to ship data, even as tension in the region threatens a broader peace deal between the US and Iran.

title: Chile’s Tren de Aragua Probe Revives Bank Secrecy Debate
title_cn: 智利特伦德阿拉瓜调查再次引发银行保密争论
summary: The June arrest of a bank employee accused of ties to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua criminal organization has reignited debate over Chile’s financial secrecy rules, which are among the strictest in the world.

title: Cosco to Use New Spanish Port Terminal to Import Cars From China
title_cn: 中远集团将使用新的西班牙港口码头从中国进口汽车
summary: Cosco Shipping Holdings Co. will use a terminal it acquired in eastern Spain mainly for car imports, underlying the country’s growing importance for Chinese automobile manufacturers.

title: Schroders Shuns Treasuries and Bunds in Favor of Italian Debt
title_cn: 施罗德避开美国国债和德国国债，转而青睐意大利债务
summary: Asset manager Schroders is buying Italian government bonds, arguing the country has already weathered the budget and political turmoil now rattling investors in other European nations and the US.

title: Record Fine Hits Romanian Bank Stocks After Interbank Rate Probe
title_cn: 银行间利率调查后罗马尼亚银行股遭遇创纪录罚款
summary: Romania’s largest bank shares tumbled after the nation’s competition watchdog imposed a record fine over alleged collusion in setting money-market rates.

title: China Ramping Up LNG Buying in Anticipation of Summer Heat
title_cn: 中国因预计夏季炎热而加大液化天然气购买力度
summary: China’s imports of liquefied natural gas are surging as the nation steps up purchases to cope with rising electricity consumption over the hotter summer months.

title: Private Markets Elite Gather in Berlin With Not-So-Super Returns
title_cn: 私募市场精英齐聚柏林，回报却不那么丰厚
summary: Private market dealmakers attending SuperReturn in Berlin this week are likely to be handed a short but sharp to-do list by their investors: give us our money back.

title: Tate & Lyle Accepts Bid From Ingredion in Loss for London
title_cn: 泰特美术馆Lyle 接受 Ingredion 伦敦的竞标
summary: Ingredion Inc. agreed to buy Tate & Lyle Plc for £2.7 billion ($3.6 billion), in a move that marks the end of the UK company’s near-century on the London Stock Exchange.

title: Asia Coal Prices Hit 2-Year High on Indonesia Export Rules
title_cn: 印尼出口规则影响亚洲煤炭价格创两年新高
summary: A key coal benchmark for Asia rose to the highest level in over two years as Indonesia’s new export rules delayed shipments, tightening supplies just as demand for the power-plant fuel rises with the onset of summer.

title: RBI Seen Joining Asia’s Rate-Hike Push as Inflation Risks Rise
title_cn: 随着通胀风险上升，印度央行有望加入亚洲加息行列
summary: The Reserve Bank of India will likely tighten monetary policy in coming months, bringing it in line with regional peers that have turned more hawkish in response to inflationary pressures stemming from the Middle East conflict, economists said.

title: India Bond Inflows Hit One-Year High After Rupee Support Steps
title_cn: 卢比支持措施后印度债券流入创一年新高
summary: India’s index-eligible bonds recorded their largest inflow in almost a year after authorities announced measures aimed at boosting foreign purchases of the nation’s debt and supporting the rupee.

title: India Rupee Defense Lifts Key Forex Tool Past $110 Billion Mark
title_cn: 印度卢比防御使关键外汇工具突破 1100 亿美元大关
summary: The Reserve Bank of India’s use of a key tool for defending the rupee has passed the $110 billion mark in recent weeks to a new record, according to people familiar with the developments.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/8/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/8/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel, Iran Exchange Missile Attacks
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗相互发射导弹袭击
summary: Israel said it struck several military targets in Iran, retaliating against missile attacks by Tehran despite President Donald Trump’s call for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to refrain from hitting back. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Asks Police to Probe Hundreds of Firms on Palm Prices
title_cn: 印度尼西亚要求警方就棕榈价格调查数百家公司
summary: Indonesia’s agriculture minister has asked police to investigate hundreds of palm oil companies that failed to pay farmers more as prices recovered from a slump driven by the country’s new export policy.

title: UK AI Minister Narayan on Bloomberg TV
title_cn: 英国人工智能部长纳拉扬在彭博电视上发言
summary: UK AI & Online Safety Minister Kanishka Narayan joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg's The Pulse. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Too Early for Rotation Into Europe Stocks: State Street
title_cn: 转向欧洲股票还为时过早：道富银行
summary: Marija Veitmane, equity research head at State Street Global Markets, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and how Middle East peace prospects impact European stocks. While an end to war and lower energy costs would benefit Europe, "it needs to come with a cyclical earnings recovery and we're just not there yet," Veitmane says on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Multiverse's Euan Blair on Bloomberg TV
title_cn: Multiverse 的尤安·布莱尔 (Euan Blair) 接受彭博电视台采访
summary: Multiverse CEO & Founder Euan Blair joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg's The Pulse. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Visionaries General Partner Dada on Bloomberg TV
title_cn: 彭博电视上的远见者普通合伙人达达
summary: Visionaries General Partner Judith Dada joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg's The Opening Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Drahi Reaches €20 Billion Deal to Sell French Phone Carrier SFR
title_cn: Drahi 达成 200 亿欧元出售法国电话运营商 SFR 的协议
summary: Billionaire Patrick Drahi has reached an agreement to sell French mobile carrier SFR to a consortium of rival telecommunications firms, in a deal that values the company €20.4 billion ($23.5 billion) and will test regulators’ tolerance for consolidation.

title: HSBC CEO Says Bank Still Needs Human Judgment in AI Era
title_cn: 汇丰银行首席执行官表示，人工智能时代银行仍需要人类判断
summary: HSBC Chief Executive Officer Georges Elhedery says that while certain roles will be displaced by artificial intelligence, the productivity gains can be reinvested. "I would like to be able to accelerate and bring forward a lot of the ambitious deliverables we have for the future," Elhedery tells Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua. "That requires investment, and that is job creation." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HSBC CEO Says ‘Human Judgment’ Is Vital Even as AI Introduced
title_cn: 汇丰银行首席执行官表示，即使引入人工智能，“人类判断”也至关重要
summary: HSBC Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Georges Elhedery said people will remain central to banks even as artificial intelligence becomes widespread, offering reassurance to employees after recent CEO comments raised concerns about the industry’s future.

title: Arcmont, Ares Lead €1.1 Billion Loan to Software Firm Cegid
title_cn: Arcmont、Ares 向软件公司 Cegid 提供 11 亿欧元贷款
summary: A group of high-profile private credit firms are lending €1.1 billion ($1.3 billion) to French business software firm Cegid, in a show of confidence in a sector that’s been rattled by an AI-induced selloff.

title: Goldman-Backed Go Prices Japan’s Biggest 2026 IPO at Upper End
title_cn: 高盛支持的日本 2026 年最大 IPO 定价处于较高水平
summary: Japan’s most popular taxi-hailing app provider Go Inc. priced its initial public offering at the upper end of the marketed range, showing investor appetite for Japan’s biggest listing so far this year.

title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Hints at Buying
title_cn: Saylor 暗示买入 比特币突破 60,000 美元后企稳
summary: Bitcoin steadied in Monday trading after dropping below $60,000 late last week as Strategy Inc. Chairman Michael Saylor hinted at further purchases.

title: Korea’s Lee Marks First Year With Vow to Find New Growth Engines
title_cn: 韩国李在镕庆祝第一年誓言寻找新的增长引擎
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung vowed to ramp up investment for a range of future growth engines and to leverage excess tax revenue generated by the surging semiconductor industry for the wider good.

title: IMF Chief Warns World Isn’t Ready for Shocks That Are Piling Up
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织总裁警告世界尚未准备好应对不断加剧的冲击
summary: International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva said that after facing crisis upon crisis in recent years, the world needs to build foundations that can withstand shocks that have become more frequent.

title: AXA Global Private CEO on Wealth Strategy
title_cn: AXA Global Private 首席执行官谈财富战略
summary: Sally Wan, CEO of AXA Global Private and AXA Greater China, discusses the outlook for the insurance firm's new platform launched at helping high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth clients manage their wealth, and look for investment opportunities. She speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Under Pressure, Jensen Huang in Seoul
title_cn: 韩国股市面临压力，黄仁勋在首尔
summary: South Korean stocks plunged as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets. Meanwhile, a tech-centered camaraderie was on display last week with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's night out in Seoul with South Korea's tech corporate royalty, including leaders from SK Group, LG Group and Naver Corp. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Says Selloff in Tech Stocks Is a Buying Opportunity
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示科技股的抛售是一个买入机会
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang called a global tech stocks selloff that began last week a buying opportunity, saying the buildout of artificial intelligence has just begun.

title: アップルAI危機の舞台裏、新Siri誕生までの知られざる社内攻防－Power On
title_cn: 苹果AI危机幕后，导致新Siri诞生的不为人知的内部斗争 - Power On
summary: アップルがAI分野の劣勢を真剣に受け止めるきっかけとなった極秘会議。Siri刷新の舞台裏に迫る。

title: JPMorgan Hires Nomura’s International AI Strategy Chief
title_cn: 摩根大通聘请野村国际人工智能战略主管
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is hiring Nomura Holdings Inc.’s international head of artificial intelligence strategy, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Wall Street bank steps up recruitment of AI specialists to boost productivity.

title: China’s Moonshot AI Seeks $30 Billion Value in New Funding Talks
title_cn: 中国的 Moonshot AI 在新的融资谈判中寻求 300 亿美元的价值
summary: Moonshot AI is seeking as much as $2 billion in a new funding round that would value the startup at $30 billion, initiating its third financing in six months to keep pace with rivals in China’s intensifying artificial intelligence race.

title: Korea’s AI Impact Sparks Pressure Across Government Bond Market
title_cn: 韩国的人工智能影响引发整个政府债券市场的压力
summary: Investor fervor for artificial intelligence that has driven South Korea’s volatile stock market to the top of global rankings is taking a toll on another market: government bonds.

title: Nvidia, SK Hynix Seal Multi-Year Pact to Develop AI Chips
title_cn: Nvidia 与 SK Hynix 签署多年开发人工智能芯片协议
summary: Nvidia Corp. and SK Hynix Inc. have agreed to partner on designing future generations of memory chips for AI, a win for a South Korean leader vying with Samsung Electronics Co. in a red-hot arena.

title: Spotify Plans to Add Live Concert Video, Tickets
title_cn: Spotify 计划添加现场音乐会视频和门票
summary: Spotify is looking to become a hub for live music

title: Sheinbaum Unveils Affordable EV Prototype Backed by Government
title_cn: Sheinbaum 推出由政府支持的经济实惠的电动汽车原型
summary: An electric vehicle startup backed by the Mexican government unveiled its first prototype in a ceremony featuring President Claudia Sheinbaum, who praised the project as an affordable mobility option and a showcase for homegrown engineering.

title: Naver to Use Nvidia’s AI Models in Bid to Cement Lead in Korea
title_cn: Naver 将使用 Nvidia 的 AI 模型巩固在韩国的领先地位
summary: South Korea’s Naver Corp. agreed to build data centers based on Nvidia Corp.’s models in a move to clinch its dominance in the country’s artificial intelligence landscape.

title: Starmer to Roll Out UK Job Center Tools to Beat AI Work Threat
title_cn: Starmer 将推出英国就业中心工具来应对人工智能工作威胁
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will promise to prevent any community from being left behind in the “tech revolution” by using artificial intelligence tools to help people find work.

title: Stocks Face Rising Risk With Mega AI Deals Ready to Flood Market
title_cn: 大型人工智能交易准备涌入市场，股票面临不断上升的风险
summary: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.

title: Kevin O’Leary’s Huge Data Center in Canada Faces a Skeptical Public
title_cn: 凯文·奥利里 (Kevin O’Leary) 位于加拿大的庞大数据中心面临公众的怀疑
summary: A proposal by a Kevin O’Leary-backed firm to build Canada’s largest data center in northwestern Alberta is facing pushback from some residents and Indigenous groups.

title: Why an AI 'Death Spiral' Threatens the Internet
title_cn: 为什么人工智能“死亡螺旋”威胁互联网
summary: For decades, publishers depended on search engines to send readers to their websites, where advertising helped fund the creation of online content. But the rise of AI-powered search is changing that model. Researchers like Rand Fishkin say “zero-click” searches are increasingly keeping users inside platforms rather than sending them to publishers, while Rutgers professor Caitlin Petre warns that falling traffic could threaten the long-term economics of journalism and content creation. Yet some large publishers are adapting. People Inc. CEO Neil Vogel says his company has offset declining search traffic through brand diversification, social media distribution, licensing agreements, and paid partnerships with AI companies. The broader question is whether the internet can continue producing the content AI depends on if fewer creators are paid for their work.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Apple’s Secret Meeting That Led It to Finally Take AI Seriously
title_cn: 苹果公司最终认真对待人工智能的秘密会议
summary: Also: What to expect at WWDC 2026.

title: Nvidia’s CEO Says New Vera Chip Will Use SK Hynix’s Memory Chips
title_cn: Nvidia首席执行官表示新的Vera芯片将使用SK Hynix的存储芯片
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said its new Vera central processing units will use SK Hynix Inc.’s memory chips as the two companies prepare to do more business in the coming year.

title: NATO Jets Shoot Down a Drone That Flew Into Latvian Airspace
title_cn: 北约喷气机击落一架飞入拉脱维亚领空的无人机
summary: NATO jets shot down a drone that flew into Latvia’s eastern airspace, the defense ministry said on Monday, in the Baltic region’s second such move in as many months.

title: Houthis to Impose ‘Complete Ban’ on Israeli Ships in Red Sea
title_cn: 胡塞武装将对以色列船只实施红海“全面禁令”
summary: The Houthis, an Iran-backed militant group that controls much of Yemen, declared a ban on Israeli ships in the Red Sea, threatening a key bypass route to the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Indonesia Has No Cabinet Reshuffle Plan for Now, Official Says
title_cn: 官员称印尼目前没有内阁改组计划
summary: Indonesia has no plan to revamp its cabinet as of now, Minister of State Secretary Prasetyo Hadi said on Monday.

title: Singapore’s Wong Warns of Growth, Inflation Risks in Second Half
title_cn: 新加坡黄氏警告下半年经济增长和通胀风险
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong warned that the economy has yet to feel the full impact of the Middle East conflict, and uncertainty remains over the growth outlook despite a strong performance in the first quarter.

title: US Pushes Iran Rebuke Over Uranium Missing Since Bombings Began
title_cn: 美国谴责伊朗自爆炸开始以来失踪的铀
summary: The US is moving to censure Iran at the United Nations atomic watchdog, escalating diplomatic pressure on the Islamic Republic over its nuclear activity as their ceasefire is seriously tested by fresh attacks involving Israel.

title: Peru Presidential Vote Is Too Close to Call as Fujimori Leads
title_cn: 藤森领先，秘鲁总统选举势均力敌
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as Conservative Keiko Fujimori nudged ahead of leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez as votes were still being counted.

title: Orban-Era Graft Cost Hungary $194 Billion, Watchdog Chief Says
title_cn: 监管机构负责人表示，欧尔班时代的腐败使匈牙利损失了 1,940 亿美元
summary: Entrenched corruption under former Hungarian leader Viktor Orban likely cost Hungary about 60 trillion forint ($194 billion) over the past 16 years, according to the head of the country’s anti-graft agency.

title: Netherlands Expands Investment Screening Rules for AI, Biotech
title_cn: 荷兰扩大人工智能、生物技术投资审查规则
summary: The Dutch government will expand its investment-screening regime to cover six additional technologies, including artificial intelligence, in a bid to better protect knowledge deemed critical to national security.

title: Cambodia Scam Centers Thrive Despite Crackdown, Amnesty Says
title_cn: 国际特赦组织称，柬埔寨诈骗中心尽管受到打击，但仍蓬勃发展
summary: Cambodia has failed to dismantle much of its online scam industry despite a yearlong crackdown that authorities said would eliminate the scourge, according to an Amnesty International report that challenges official claims of success.

title: Founders Forum Group CEO Dawson on Bloomberg TV
title_cn: 创始人论坛集团首席执行官道森接受彭博电视台采访
summary: Founders Forum Group CEO Carolyn Dawson speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off a big week of tech events in London. She joined Bloomberg Daybreak Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel and Iran Trade Missile Attacks, Jeopardizing Peace Talks | Daybreak Europe 06/08/2026
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗进行导弹袭击，危及和平谈判欧洲黎明 06/08/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Stocks and bonds dropped as investors faced a trio of headwinds with a pullback in the artificial-intelligence trade, mounting bets on a US interest rate hike and rising oil prices due to a worsening of the Middle East conflict.

Israel and Iran exchanged missile strikes on Monday despite President Donald Trump’s calls for both sides to halt the fighting and give peace talks a chance to succeed.

And Intesa Sanpaolo offered to buy Monte dei Paschi for €30.6 billion ($35.3 billion) in a move that’s set to spur a new phase of dealmaking in Italian finance.

Today's guest: Lauren van Biljon, Allspring Global Investments, Senior Portfolio Manager (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pashinyan Wins Third Term as Armenia Backs Shift Toward West
title_cn: 亚美尼亚支持向西方转移，帕希尼扬赢得第三个任期
summary: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claimed victory in parliamentary elections as voters overwhelmingly backed the South Caucasus country’s turn toward the West and away from Russia.

title: Trump Demands Immediate Halt to Iran and Israel Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普要求立即停止对伊朗和以色列的袭击
summary: Emergency services examine a fragment of an intercepted Iranian missile in northern Israel, on June 7. Photographer: Rami Shlush/AP Photo

title: Kosovo Remains in Deadlock as PM Wins Third Election in Row
title_cn: 科索沃仍陷入僵局，总理连续第三次赢得选举
summary: Kosovo Prime Minister Albin Kurti won a third election in a row while failing to secure an outright majority in parliament, raising questions about how he plans to break a political deadlock that has paralyzed the country’s fragmented politics for 18 months.

title: European Leaders Join Ukraine Call for Ceasefire With Russia
title_cn: 欧洲领导人加入乌克兰呼吁与俄罗斯停火
summary: European leaders called on Russian President Vladimir Putin to agree to an immediate and complete ceasefire that allows talks to begin on a lasting peace deal.

title: South Korea Names First Female PM in Decades to Lead AI Push
title_cn: 韩国任命数十年来首位女总理领导人工智能发展
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung is placing his hopes on former Naver Corp. chief executive Han Seong Sook to help better utilize the nation’s tech expertise for future growth and ensure its benefits spread more widely through the economy.

title: Israel Retaliates Against Iran After Missile Attack
title_cn: 以色列在导弹袭击后对伊朗进行报复
summary: Israel said it struck several military targets in Iran, retaliating against missile attacks by Tehran. The exchange is one of the most serious tests of a ceasefire that took effect on April 8 to halt fighting involving the US, Israel and Iran. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Steps Up Migrant Crackdown as Protests Surge
title_cn: 随着抗议活动的激增，南非加大了对移民的镇压力度
summary: South Africa’s leader announced a crackdown on undocumented migrants in the country following a spate of protests and xenophobic attacks, while reiterating that citizens shouldn’t take the law into their own hands.

title: Xi Gets Warm North Korea Welcome as Kim Draws Nuclear Red Line
title_cn: 金正恩划定核红线，习近平受到朝鲜热烈欢迎
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping received an elaborate welcome upon arriving in North Korea, kicking off a visit aimed at reasserting Beijing’s influence over an emboldened neighbor with an expanding nuclear arsenal and a deepening alliance with Russia.

title: The European Union Has a $2 Trillion Taiwan Problem
title_cn: 欧盟面临价值2万亿美元的台湾问题
summary: Just before dawn on Jan. 17, a Chinese military drone crossed for the first time into Taiwanese airspace above a disputed coral reef in the South China Sea. The reconnaissance aircraft lingered over Pratas Island for a few minutes, while the Taiwanese issued warnings to leave over international radio frequencies.

title: New Referendum Would Flip Brexit Result 10 Years on, Poll Finds
title_cn: 民意调查发现，新的公投将推翻十年后的脱欧结果
summary: A UK poll shows that a new Brexit referendum would reverse the vote that led to Britain’s departure from the European Union a decade ago.

title: Australia’s Far-Right One Nation Tops Labor in Opinion Poll
title_cn: 澳大利亚极右翼国家在民意调查中领先工党
summary: Australia’s populist One Nation party has edged ahead of the ruling Labor Party in a Newspoll for the first time as Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s popularity plumbs fresh lows.

title: Israel Strikes Iran After Missile Attack, Imperiling Trump Talks
title_cn: 以色列在导弹袭击后袭击伊朗，危及特朗普会谈
summary: Israel said it struck several military targets in Iran, retaliating against missile attacks by Tehran despite President Donald Trump’s call for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to refrain from hitting back.

title: Xi Jinping Gets Warm Welcome in First North Korea Visit in 7 Years
title_cn: 习近平七年来首次访问朝鲜受到热烈欢迎
summary: Xi Jinping and Kim Jong Un in Sept. 2025. Photographer: JADE GAO/AFP

title: UK Jobs Slump Deepens as Starmer Woes Add to Headwinds, REC Says
title_cn: REC表示，随着Starmer的困境加剧，英国就业下滑加剧
summary: British employers scaled back hiring at an accelerated pace in May amid continuing war in the Middle East and political turmoil at home, according to a survey watched by the Bank of England.

title: Pashinyan Leads in Armenia’s Vote That Had Russia in Focus
title_cn: 帕希尼扬在亚美尼亚投票中领先，俄罗斯成为焦点
summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan’s party leads in Armenia’s parliamentary election that would determine whether he gets mandate strong enough to reorient the country toward Europe even as tensions with Russia grow.

title: UK Plans Hospital, School Funding Cuts to Boost Defense Budget
title_cn: 英国计划削减医院和学校资金以增加国防预算
summary: The UK government is planning to cut £6 billion ($8 billion) in investment for projects such as schools and hospitals over the next four years to help fund a £15 billion increase in spending on defense, according to local media reports.
